author: Besting
text: AFFECTED by config/store split (2026-06-06, bl-2e26): argv parsing must handle the new forms — `install <path>` (a PATH arg, not an object enum; bl-3dd9), `prime --install` (recursive; bl-9329), `--stealth`, `install --from/--to <ref>`. And 'resolve the store + operating checkout (terminus)' is STALE: there is no operating/terminus — task ops resolve the STORE checkout (tasks_branch) and config/install ops the LANDING, per the seal-target split (bl-f970). No trail walk.
